title: Tarotoo Tarot Card Meanings (All 78 Cards)
subtitle: Complete Rider-Waite-Smith dataset: meanings, keywords, love/career, astrology, yes/no
description:
A complete, structured dataset of all 78 tarot cards (22 Major Arcana + 56 Minor Arcana) in the Rider-Waite-Smith tradition, published by Tarotoo (tarotoo.com) as part of its AI transparency initiative. Each card includes upright and reversed meanings, keywords, love and career contexts, elemental and astrological associations (Golden Dawn attributions), and a yes/no value for yes-or-no readings.

Fields: id, name, arcana, suit, number, element, astrology, yes_no, keywords_upright, keywords_reversed, meaning_upright, meaning_reversed, love, career.

Source of truth: https://github.com/Tarotoo-com/tarotoo-tarot-dataset
DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21268290
MCP server: https://github.com/Tarotoo-com/tarotoo-mcp-server

License: CC BY 4.0 with attribution to Tarotoo (tarotoo.com). For entertainment and self-reflection purposes only.

resources.description: All 78 tarot cards, one row per card (keywords joined with '; ')
Canonical JSON: array of 78 card objects
